_documentation: Edit the 'projects' array to manage every card on Home, Projects, and Showcase, plus each project's own /projects/{id}/ page. Fields: id (unique slug, also used in its URL), name, url, category, status ('live' | 'beta' | 'soon'), featured (bool — shows in the Home marquee/featured grid and on Showcase), title/description, tags (array of short strings). icon: a Lucide sprite name (see icons/lucide-sprite.svg) shown only if the real favicon fails to load. favicon (optional): an exact favicon URL to use instead of guessing '{domain}/favicon.ico' — set this if a project's favicon lives at a different path (this is common; not every site serves one at the conventional root path).
